gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT]. Meteoblue indicates slight rain (0.1-0.2") whereas baseline predicts a 26% chance of rain. Temperature details are not stated by Meteoblue. This might be the day to carry an umbrella, just in case, even if the rain seems more like a timid gazelle than a roaring lion.
